headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -133.9)
key_insights: Fears trending up 100% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 159 quotes and an exceptionally high proportion of strong-intensity posts (141 out of 159), driving a score of 98.1 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This score sits in the upper half of the 173-day range (−1.0 to 169.8), signalling well above average frustration levels though not yet at peak.
• Optimism slipped further to −35.9 (from −15.0 yesterday), weighed down by 20 mild-intensity quotes, suggesting low-energy or half-hearted positive sentiment.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
